title: docs: update README — 2026-06-23
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News section. (Recent Apps is refreshed by app-update-metrics.yml.)

gist.headline: Daily News Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot gave the README its daily polish, keeping the latest news fresh for everyone visiting the repo.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the Latest News section in the repository README.
gist.impact: Visitors to the GitHub repository will see the most up-to-date news and announcements.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as a newsie, holding a newspaper, representing the daily news update to the README.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny newsboy cap, holding a freshly printed pixelated newspaper. Beside her, a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head displays a glowing text document. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
